zh.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund de Missenden於1342年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登時，他的父親Sir Thomas Missenden23歲，母親Isabella de Brocas22歲。他於1369年6月與Juliana Grey結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1394年10月12日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund de Missenden于1342年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Missenden23岁，母亲Isabella de Brocas22岁。他于1369年6月与Juliana Grey结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1394年10月12日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Missenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fishenden
meanings: English: locative name from the lost place-name Festinden in Hawkhurst (Kent), recorded as Festendenn about 1270.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund de Missenden was born in 1342, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Missenden, was 23 and his mother, Isabella de Brocas, was 22. He married Juliana Grey in June 1369. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 12 October 1394, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund de Missenden est né en 1342, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Missenden, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Brocas, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Grey en juin 1369. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1394, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund de Missenden 1342 in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Missenden 23 und seine Mutter Isabella de Brocas 22. Er hat im Juni 1369 Juliana Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1394 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund de Missenden è nato il nel 1342 nel Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Missenden, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Brocas, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Grey nel giugno 1369. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 ottobre 1394, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, Unite: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund de Missendenが1342年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Missendenは23歳，母Isabella de Brocasは22歳であった。1369年6月にJuliana Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1394年10月12日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund de Missenden(이)가 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Missenden(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Brocas(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1369년 6월 Juliana Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 10월 12일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund de Missenden nasceu em 1342, em Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Missenden, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Brocas, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Grey em junho de 1369. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1394, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund de Missenden родился в 1342 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Missenden было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Brocas, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Grey июнь 1369 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 12 октября 1394 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund de Missenden nació en 1342, en Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Missenden, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabella de Brocas, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Juliana Grey en junio de 1369. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1394, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
